paper_title: Towards Characterization of 5-List-Colorability of Toroidal Graphs
summary: Conjecture 8 from arXiv:2407.18800 asserts that there is no critical prism-canvas of spacing at least five. It was motivated by a computer-assisted enumeration that found 510, 2719, 300, and 5 candidates at spacings one through four respectively, suggesting the list becomes empty at spacing five. No follow-up paper addressing or resolving this conjecture has been found as of May 2026; Semantic Scholar also shows zero citations to the source paper.
search_queries: Moreno Peñarrubia "5-choosability" toroidal 2025 arxiv list coloring
notes: No follow-up found. Semantic Scholar API returns an empty citations list for arXiv:2407.18800 as of May 2026. The conjecture is recent (posted July 2024) and highly specific to the computer-assisted classification program for 5-list-colorability of toroidal graphs; absence of follow-up literature is expected.
